papers.title: SkillOpt: Executive Strategy for Self-Evolving Agent Skills
papers.authors: Yifan Yang, Ziyang Gong, Weiquan Huang, Qihao Yang, Ziwei Zhou, et al.
papers.affiliations: Microsoft Research; Shanghai Jiao Tong University; Tongji University; Fudan University
papers.score_reason_zh: 把“技能文档”当可优化外部状态，配合验证门控与受控编辑，实现跨模型/多基准的稳定增益；与内容治理场景的关联主要来自可复用流程与规则沉淀。
papers.score_reason_en: Treats skill docs as optimizable external state with validation-gated edits; strong, stable gains across models/benchmarks. Relevance comes from reusable procedures/policies for governance workflows.
papers.method_zh: 提出 SkillOpt：用一个“优化器模型”把带评分的执行轨迹转成对单份 skill 文档的 add/delete/replace 受控编辑，并用 held-out 验证集做门控，只接受带来验证提升的更新。通过“文本学习率预算、拒绝编辑缓存、epoch 级慢更新”等机制保证更新稳定，并且部署时不增加额外推理开销。
papers.method_en: SkillOpt trains a single skill document as an external state: a separate optimizer model converts scored rollouts into bounded add/delete/replace edits, and a held-out gate only accepts edits that improve validation. Stability comes from a textual learning-rate budget, rejected-edit buffer, and epoch-wise slow/meta updates, with zero extra inference overhead at deployment.
papers.innovation_zh: 把技能优化从“随意改 prompt/技能”提升为类深度学习训练流程：有步长控制、有验证门控、有负样本（拒绝编辑）记忆，还强调跨 harness 迁移。这个 framing 对企业/业务治理的“流程沉淀与持续迭代”非常贴合。
papers.innovation_en: Reframes skill improvement as a training-like optimization loop (step-size control, validation gating, negative feedback via rejected edits) and validates transfer across execution harnesses. The framing matches enterprise governance needs for auditable, iteratively-improved procedures.
papers.metrics_zh: 在 GPT-5.5（direct chat）上：SearchQA 77.7→87.3、SpreadsheetBench 41.8→80.7、OfficeQA 33.1→72.1、DocVQA 78.8→91.2、LiveMathematicianBench 37.6→66.9、ALFWorld 83.6→95.5，平均 +23.5 分。并在 6 个基准×7 个模型×3 种执行 harness 的 52/52 个设置里达到 best 或 tied-best。
papers.metrics_en: On GPT-5.5 (direct chat): SearchQA 77.7→87.3, SpreadsheetBench 41.8→80.7, OfficeQA 33.1→72.1, DocVQA 78.8→91.2, LiveMathematicianBench 37.6→66.9, ALFWorld 83.6→95.5 (avg +23.5). Best or tied-best on all 52 evaluated (model, benchmark, harness) settings.

papers.title: From Raw Experience to Skill Consumption: A Systematic Study of Model-Generated Agent Skills
papers.authors: Zisu Huang, Jingwen Xu, Yifan Yang, Ziyang Gong, Qihao Yang, et al.
papers.affiliations: Fudan University; Microsoft Research; Shanghai Jiao Tong University
papers.score_reason_zh: 贡献在于把“经验→抽取→消费”全链路做系统性实验，并揭示负迁移与 extractor/consumer 不一致；但方法偏分析与工具链改进，离业务落地还需二次工程。
papers.score_reason_en: Strong lifecycle-level evaluation and insights (negative transfer; extractor vs consumer asymmetry). More of a systematic study than a new algorithm; business adoption needs additional engineering.
papers.method_zh: 构建一个以“技能带来的真实效用增益”为核心的评测框架，覆盖 5 个 agent 域（具身、表格、编码、检索、工具调用），系统对比不同 extractor 与不同 target agent 的组合，提出 Extraction Efficacy（EE）与 Target Evolvability（TE）两个指标拆解“会抽取”和“会消费”。最后把分析结果沉淀为一套 meta-skill 指导抽取，减少负迁移。
papers.method_en: Builds a utility-grounded evaluation for the full skill lifecycle across five agent domains, varying both skill extractors and target agents. Introduces Extraction Efficacy (EE) and Target Evolvability (TE) to decouple 'good extractor' vs 'good consumer', and distills findings into a meta-skill that guides extraction to reduce negative transfer.
papers.innovation_zh: 亮点是把技能研究从“只看装上技能有没有提升”推进到“为什么提升/为什么伤害”的可解释维度，并明确提出 extractor/consumer 的角色不对称。meta-skill 的形式也更利于产业复用。
papers.innovation_en: Moves beyond 'does a skill help' to diagnosing when/why it helps or hurts, highlighting extractor/consumer role asymmetry. The meta-skill framing is practical for reuse in real agent stacks.
papers.metrics_zh: 在五个域的表格（Table 1）中展示了不同模型组合的技能增益与负迁移现象；另外通过 rubric-guided 的 meta-skill，把技能效用判断准确率从 46.4% 提升到 73.8%。
papers.metrics_en: Table 1 reports skill-induced gains and non-trivial negative transfer across five domains. A rubric-guided meta-skill improves utility-judging accuracy from 46.4% to 73.8%.

papers.title: HINT-SD: Targeted Hindsight Self-Distillation for Long-Horizon Agents
papers.authors: Woongyeng Yeo, Yumin Choi, Taekyung Ki, Sung Ju Hwang
papers.score_reason_zh: 把“哪里该监督”作为关键问题，用全轨迹 hindsight 只选失败相关步骤做反馈蒸馏，能显著提升训练效率；与治理业务的关联在于长链路任务（巡检、处置、申诉）的 agent 训练。
papers.score_reason_en: Targets the core bottleneck of where to apply feedback; full-trajectory hindsight selects failure-relevant spans for distillation, improving efficiency. Relevant for long-horizon governance agents (audit, enforcement, appeal workflows).
papers.method_zh: 在失败轨迹里，先用 hindsight 分析定位“真正导致失败”的少量 action span，并为每个 span 生成纠正性反馈；再用“带反馈的 teacher（同策略/同模型）”对这些 span 做 token 级蒸馏，而 student 不看反馈。相比对每一轮都生成/蒸馏反馈的 dense baseline，HINT-SD 只在关键步骤监督，降低成本并减少噪声更新。
papers.method_en: For failed trajectories, a hindsight analyzer identifies a sparse set of failure-relevant action spans and generates corrective feedback. A feedback-conditioned teacher provides token-level targets only on those spans, while the student learns without feedback. Compared to dense per-turn feedback, HINT-SD focuses supervision where it matters, reducing cost and noise.
papers.innovation_zh: 创新点在于把反馈蒸馏从“每步都监督”变为“先定位根因步骤再监督”，更符合长链路失败归因的结构；同时让效率和效果一起提升，而不是单纯堆更多反馈。
papers.innovation_en: Key novelty is reframing distillation as a target-selection problem: locate root-cause steps first, then distill. This matches long-horizon credit assignment and improves both efficiency and effectiveness.
papers.metrics_zh: 在 BFCL v3 与 AppWorld 上，相比 dense per-turn feedback baseline，最高提升 18.80%，且每步训练时间降低到 1/2.26。
papers.metrics_en: On BFCL v3 and AppWorld, improves up to 18.80% over a dense per-turn feedback baseline while reducing time per training step by 2.26×.

papers.title: From Seeing to Thinking: Decoupling Perception and Reasoning Improves Post-Training of Vision-Language Models
papers.authors: Juncheng Wu, Hardy Chen, Haoqin Tu, Freda Shi, Cihang Xie, Yuyin Zhou, et al.
papers.affiliations: Amazon; UC Santa Cruz; University of Waterloo; Vector Institute
papers.score_reason_zh: 把“感知先于推理”作为可操作的后训练课程维度，并给出可扩展数据合成与 RLVR 训练流程；对电商图文/短视频理解的可迁移价值较高，但收益幅度在部分基准上偏温和。
papers.score_reason_en: Introduces a capability curriculum (perception before reasoning) with scalable data synthesis and RLVR. Highly transferable to e-commerce multimodal understanding, though improvements are moderate on some benchmarks.
papers.method_zh: 把 VLM 后训练拆成三阶段：视觉感知、文本推理、视觉推理；每阶段用专门数据与训练目标优化，并强调阶段顺序的重要性（先固化感知再做推理）。提出能力维度 curriculum，与传统“难度 curriculum”正交，可叠加带来进一步收益。
papers.method_en: Decomposes VLM post-training into three stages: visual perception, textual reasoning, and visual reasoning, each optimized with specialized data/objectives and a critical stage order (perception first). Treats capability-based staging as an orthogonal curriculum dimension to difficulty-based curricula.
papers.innovation_zh: 相当于给“多模态后训练”补上了一个经常被忽略的 axis：不是让模型想更久，而是先让模型看对，再让它推理。对内容审核/商品理解这类强依赖细粒度视觉线索的任务尤其关键。
papers.innovation_en: Adds a largely-missing axis in multimodal post-training: not longer thinking, but correct seeing first. Particularly important for tasks relying on fine-grained visual cues (content moderation, product understanding).
papers.metrics_zh: 报告称 Qwen3-VL-8B 在 WeMath 从 50.9% 提升到 56.1%，并在多模型上 staged training 相比 merged training 获得更高准确率且推理 trace 更短（例如 +1.46 pt、trace -20.8%）。
papers.metrics_en: Reports Qwen3-VL-8B WeMath 50.9%→56.1%, and staged training improves accuracy with shorter reasoning traces (e.g., +1.46 pt with -20.8% trace length) across multiple backbones.

papers.title: See What I Mean: Aligning Vision and Language Representations for Video Fine-grained Object Understanding
papers.authors: Boyuan Sun, Bowen Yin, Yuanming Li, Xihan Wei, Qibin Hou
papers.score_reason_zh: 通过训练期 mask 对齐 cross-attention，让推理期只用自然语言也能做细粒度对象指代，适合短视频商品/达人内容理解；但方法更偏工程型对齐，泛化到复杂场景仍需更多验证。
papers.score_reason_en: Trains cross-attention alignment with mask supervision so inference needs only natural language references—useful for fine-grained object grounding in short-video commerce. More engineering-style alignment; broader generalization needs more evidence.
papers.method_zh: 观察到 MLLM 的 cross-attention：属性词更局部、对象名词更发散，导致纯文本指代目标对象困难。构建 NL-Refer 数据集（mask+自然语言指代表达），训练时从多层 cross-attention 抽取对象名词注意力图，与 GT mask 做空间一致性约束；推理时无需点/框/mask 等视觉提示。
papers.method_en: Finds that cross-attention for attribute words is localized but object nouns are diffuse, hurting text-only reference. Builds NL-Refer (masks + natural-language referring expressions) and trains SWIM by extracting multi-layer cross-attention maps for object nouns and enforcing spatial consistency with ground-truth masks. Inference requires no visual prompts.
papers.innovation_zh: 核心亮点是“训练期用视觉监督纠正语言→视觉指代偏差，推理期保持交互自然”。这对电商短视频里“用户只说名字/描述，不提供框点”的交互很贴合。
papers.innovation_en: Key idea: use training-time visual supervision to fix noun-to-region grounding, while keeping inference interaction purely natural-language. This matches realistic commerce scenarios where users rarely provide boxes/points.
papers.metrics_zh: 在 VideoRefer-Q 上平均准确率 78.3%，相比 VideoRefer-7B 提升 +6.4%，高于 Qwen2.5-VL-7B（71.8）与 GPT-4o（71.3）；在 VideoRefer-D 上平均 3.78，高于 DAM-8B（3.68）。
papers.metrics_en: VideoRefer-Q avg accuracy 78.3% (+6.4 over VideoRefer-7B), higher than Qwen2.5-VL-7B (71.8) and GPT-4o (71.3). VideoRefer-D avg 3.78, outperforming DAM-8B (3.68).

papers.title: LatentUMM: Dual Latent Alignment for Unified Multimodal Models
papers.authors: Yinyi Luo, Wenwen Wang, Hayes Bai, Marios Savvides, Jindong Wang
papers.score_reason_zh: 聚焦 UMM 的“生成↔再理解”一致性问题，提出显式对齐与 latent rollout 偏好优化；但与电商治理直接相关度一般，且指标主要是多模态一致性/理解生成评测。
papers.score_reason_en: Targets a real issue (generation↔re-encoding consistency) with explicit alignment + latent rollouts, but relevance to e-commerce governance is indirect and metrics are mostly multimodal consistency benchmarks.
papers.method_zh: 认为 UMM 的问题不在于有没有共享 latent，而在于编码/解码映射没对齐，导致跨模态循环产生语义漂移。提出两阶段：Dual Latent Alignment（用更强 embedding 约束跨模态语义 + 双向 capacity 对齐），以及 Latent Dynamics Stabilization（在 latent 空间做随机 rollout 并用偏好优化选择更稳定轨迹）。
papers.method_en: Argues inconsistency comes from misaligned encode/decode transformations rather than lack of shared latent space. Proposes dual latent alignment (cross-modal semantics regularized by a stronger embedding model + bidirectional capacity alignment) and latent dynamics stabilization via stochastic latent rollouts with preference optimization.
papers.innovation_zh: 把“共享空间”进一步推进到“共享空间里的双向映射必须对齐”，并用 rollout+偏好优化去稳定 latent 动力学，这个组合对下一代 UMM 可信一致性有启发。
papers.innovation_en: Pushes from 'shared latent space' to explicitly aligning bidirectional transformations, and stabilizes latent dynamics with rollout + preference optimization—useful guidance for more coherent UMMs.
papers.metrics_zh: 在多个 backbone 上理解/生成指标均提升（如表格示例：Bagel +LatentUMM 在 DPG/UEval 等生成侧指标以及 MME/MMMU/MMVet/MathVista 等理解侧指标有小幅增益）。
papers.metrics_en: Reports consistent improvements on both generation and understanding metrics across multiple backbones (e.g., Bagel/Janus-Pro/Harmon show gains on DPG/UEval and MME/MMMU/MMVet/MathVista).

papers.title: Lens: Rethinking Training Efficiency for Foundational Text-to-Image Models
papers.authors: Dong Chen, Fangyun Wei, Ziyu Wan, Dongdong Chen, Jinjing Zhao, et al.
papers.score_reason_zh: 对内容生态很有用（商品图/素材生成），并把“数据密度+多分辨率 batch+RL 后训练+蒸馏加速”做成完整开源套件；但偏生成侧，治理相关性属于间接。
papers.score_reason_en: Very useful for content creation (product/marketing visuals) with a full open-source pipeline, but governance relevance is indirect since it is generation-focused.
papers.method_zh: 提出 3.8B 的高效文生图模型 Lens：用 8 亿条“密集长 caption”数据、混合分辨率/宽高比 batching 提升每步信息量，并配合语义 VAE、更强语言编码器加速收敛；后训练阶段用 taxonomy-driven prompts 的 RL 与结构化 reward 抑制伪影，并蒸馏得到 4-step 的 turbo 版本。
papers.method_en: Lens is a 3.8B text-to-image model emphasizing training efficiency: dense long-caption data (800M), mixed-resolution/aspect-ratio batching, semantic VAE and a strong language encoder for faster convergence. Post-training uses taxonomy-driven RL with structured rewards and distillation to a 4-step turbo variant.
papers.innovation_zh: 把“训练效率”落到可复用 recipe：不仅缩小模型，还从数据密度与 batch 构造入手，并把 RL+Reasoner+蒸馏加速串成全链路。对于电商内容生产的成本/时延约束很现实。
papers.innovation_en: Turns efficiency into a reproducible recipe: not just a smaller model, but higher information density per step via data/batching, plus RL alignment and distillation for fast inference—practical for commerce content constraints.
papers.metrics_zh: 训练算力约为 Z-Image 的 19.3%；单卡 H100 生成 1024² 约 3.15s，turbo 版 4-step 约 0.84s，并在多个基准（OneIG/GenEval/LongText/CVTG）达到/超过更大模型。
papers.metrics_en: Uses ~19.3% of Z-Image training compute; 1024² image generation ~3.15s on one H100, turbo 4-step ~0.84s; competitive or better than >6B models on multiple benchmarks (OneIG/GenEval/LongText/CVTG).

papers.title: The Expense of Seeing: Attaining Trustworthy Multimodal Reasoning Within the Monolithic Paradigm
papers.score_reason_zh: 提出新的评价视角（用“语义翻译”替代 ablation），对治理/风控里多模态可信性很关键；但目前更多是观点与指标定义，缺少大规模实证与可复现工具链。
papers.score_reason_en: Important evaluation reframing for trustworthy multimodal systems, but currently more conceptual/metric-definition with limited large-scale empirical tooling.
papers.method_zh: 指出主流 Vision-Encoder+Projector+LLM 范式常靠语言先验“装作看见”，提出 Modality Translation Protocol：不是删掉图片/文本做 ablation，而是把样本的语义载荷在模态间翻译，以此定义 ToS/CoS/FoS 三类指标，并归纳为 Semantic Sufficiency Criterion（SSC）。
papers.method_en: Argues monolithic VLMs can exploit language priors ('functional blindness'). Proposes a Modality Translation Protocol that translates semantic payloads across modalities instead of ablating inputs, defining Toll/Curse/Fallacy of Seeing and a Semantic Sufficiency Criterion (SSC).
papers.innovation_zh: 对“多模态可信性”给出更信息论的诊断框架，避免把数据集偏差与架构瓶颈混在一起；对内容审核（图文/视频）里“是否真的看到了证据”很有启发。
papers.innovation_en: Provides an information-theoretic diagnostic lens separating dataset bias from architectural bottlenecks—highly relevant to whether moderation models truly 'see' evidence.
papers.metrics_zh: 主要是提出指标与假设（如 multimodal scaling 可能带来更强的视觉瓶颈惩罚），未以统一基准给出大量 SOTA 数字。
papers.metrics_en: Primarily proposes metrics and hypotheses (e.g., scaling may worsen visual bottleneck penalties) rather than reporting extensive SOTA benchmark numbers.

papers.title: Symmetry Acquisition in Predictive Coding Networks
papers.authors: Adam Shaw, Jiayu Li, Michael Sperling, Michael Kim, Alvin Jin
papers.score_reason_zh: 有趣的表征诊断方法（persistent homology 跟踪对称性合并），但与电商内容/治理相关性较弱，且工作坊论文信息有限。
papers.score_reason_en: Interesting representational probe (persistent homology), but weak direct relevance to e-commerce content/governance; workshop-format details are limited.
papers.method_zh: 研究 predictive coding networks（PCN）在层间学习“表征对称性”的过程，用 persistent homology 跟踪数据流形区域何时被合并，并分析合并时机与模型容量、激活平滑度以及重建质量的关系。
papers.method_en: Studies how predictive coding networks acquire representational symmetries across layers, using persistent homology to track when distinct manifold regions merge, and relates merge timing to capacity, activation smoothness, and reconstruction quality.
papers.innovation_zh: 亮点是把拓扑工具用在表示学习诊断上，让“早抽象/可逆性”的权衡可量化。
papers.innovation_en: Applies topological tools to representation diagnostics, making the abstraction–invertibility tradeoff measurable.
papers.metrics_zh: 报告称表征合并的时机与模型容量相关（ρ≈0.72–0.79），且更早合并与更差重建相关（ρ≈−0.58）。
papers.metrics_en: Reports symmetry-merge timing correlates with model capacity (ρ≈0.72–0.79), and earlier merging correlates with worse reconstruction (ρ≈−0.58).
